title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech examines code generation adoption at Google through 2026, comparing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities. The video uses "vibing" as slang for using or preferring AI-assisted code generation tools and surveys adoption trends across major tech companies.
